selected_goal: Add a real-PDF regression guard for the S20 P51 q6 mark-scheme contamination and run final focused verification.
why_this_now: The user reported remaining issues especially in 2008-2021 papers. S20 P51 q6 reproduced the exact failure mode with a real paper and mark scheme, so it should become a test guard instead of only a manual probe.
repo_evidence: tests/test_sample_pipeline.py already exercises process_sample on real or fixture PDFs.
acceptance_criteria: A real S20 P51 pipeline test confirms question 6 answer text excludes Mark Scheme Notes, Specific Marking Principles, and question 7.
The q6 mark-scheme image is not a tall multi-question crop.
Focused rendering, question-detection, and regression tests pass.
test_expectations: Add a real-PDF test with OCR disabled for deterministic local execution.
Run the new test by itself.
Attempt a broader non-integration run and report unrelated blockers if present.
implementation_boundaries: Do not require OCR for the regression.
Do not mask existing unrelated repository test failures.
repo_hygiene_risk: Low: test-only change using repository PDFs and pytest temporary output.
rollback_plan: Remove the S20 P51 constants and real-PDF regression test from tests/test_sample_pipeline.py.
done_when: The S20 P51 real-PDF regression passes.
Focused rendering, question-detection, and regression gates pass.
Any broad-suite failures are reported as unrelated rather than hidden.
